title: Mallow Hot Dog 22g – Soft Marshmallow Treat - Assorted Fruit Flavour Marshmallow (24 x Pack)
features: Mallow Hot Dog 22g – Soft Marshmallow Treat - Assorted Fruit Flavour Marshmallow
Fun hot dog shape, perfect for kids
Assorted fruit flavours for variety marshmallow
Great for parties, lunchboxes, or on-the-go enjoyment
description: Product description Mallow Hot Dog 22g – Soft Marshmallow Treat - Assorted Fruit Flavour Marshmallow. Enjoy a fun and delicious treat with the Mallow Hot Dog 22g. This soft marshmallow snack is shaped like a hot dog and comes in assorted fruit flavours, offering a sweet and fluffy indulgence. Perfect as a quick snack, party treat, or a delightful addition to lunchboxes, it’s a tasty way to satisfy your sweet cravings anytime. Ingredients Glucose-Fructose Syrup, Sugar, Water, Pork Gelatine, Corn Starch, Flavouring, Colours (E100, E162).
